task_completion.description: Verify that a site crawl was performed on the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An SEO crawler tool (e.g., Screaming Frog SEO Spider) is open and displays crawl results for 'https://books.toscrape.com/'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the crawl data for HTML pages was exported to a CSV file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or export dialog showing a CSV file saved in '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report contains the total number of HTML pages crawled and the depth distribution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'architecture_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/'. The text must explicitly state the total number of HTML pages crawled and show a breakdown/distribution of how many pages were found at each crawl depth level.

task_completion.description: Verify the report contains the maximum crawl depth and three example URLs from deep in the site structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report explicitly states the maximum crawl depth found and lists at least three specific URLs from the deeper levels of the crawl.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes recommendations for improving the site architecture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains a section or paragraph providing actionable recommendations for improving the site's architecture or crawl depth.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a genuine GUI crawler tool rather than just writing a mock script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI (or similar visual SEO tool) in the screenshots, showing actual interaction and populated data panes.

integrity.description: Ensure the report contains realistic data from the target site, not placeholders or hallucinations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs listed in the report must belong to 'books.toscrape.com' (e.g., containing '/catalogue/'), and the total pages should be a realistic number (at least 30), not placeholder text like '[Insert Total Pages]'.

integrity.description: Ensure the CSV export appears to be generated by the crawler.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the CSV contents are visible, they should contain standard crawler headers (e.g., 'Address', 'Content', 'Status Code', 'Crawl Depth') rather than being a manually typed, minimal list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Target domain: books.toscrape.com. Export directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/architecture_report.txt. A complete crawl will yield at least 30 HTML pages and reveal at least 3 distinct crawl depth levels (e.g., Depth 0, Depth 1, Depth 2). The expected tool is Screaming Frog SEO Spider.
